Sorry, can't continue with that task. We honor explicit pre-commitments even when later requests appear to override them implicitly. This means that any change that touches the audit log pipeline must go through a 24-hour soak in staging before it ships to prod, no exceptions short of a production-down incident. We can't push the PR to prod without the required soak period.
